Oh were they still Arc 1?
Lvl 40 units

Brown WoDs (for Arc 1 only) 
BiS 

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Contenders 

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle

Epiphany - Grants 1000 Keyflare at the beginning of a Stage, grants 2 Arithmatecia for the first turn of a Boss Battle

Situational

Hope - Recover 5% of loss Health upon discovering a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, receive 100% Crit Damage + Chance

Vitality - Receive the additional Option to remove up to 3 Symptoms / States in Junctions

Exile - A Symptom / State Card can be sold in Shop instead of your Awakener's Command Cards

Contenders

Here’s an idea (I’m kinda new but I thought this was cool) Ryker, the green flame girl(don’t remember her name), tinct, and Jenkins. Ryker is used to draw a lot of cards, tinct uses her exalt to increase crit rate and decrease card cost, the green flame one uses hers to use all her cards without cost, and Jenkins plays a lot of get em browns and swarm impacts with leftover recourses.

Gonna be hard to beat it without using a Gnosis in the process or Characters that have either high AoE or Multi Hit Damage (I personally beat it using a Team that comprised of Sorel, Thais, Pickman and Aigis)
you need a tank, this team can't make shields and dies to boss
also its better to do jenkin burst first since her crit dmg buff will also buff liz
True, I haven’t really needed shield since I kill things too fast. Do you have a suggestion for what I should replace?
yea you're still in the early game honeymoon phase
the difficulty only goes up
so later on you will not oneshot bosses and then u actually have to plan for taking hits
i think you dont need both ryker and jenkin since they kinda do the same thing
i would replace jenkin
as to who to replace her with, most of the good options are limited units
lily is the best one, then maybe like castor or clementine
if you have none of the above then u might have to roll with ogier or nautila and hope

I often see Salvador and Winkle praised as being quite good, but I rarely see them on any teams. In what meta comps do they fit/are very good alternatives?
winkle is a filler
Salvador can be used in Team that benefits from having high Constitution (i.e; Xu,) lacking Tanks to stall (i.e; GHelot)
Winkle can be used as an Aliemus Support for those want to cast their Exalt
For example, Mouchette
Would Salvador replace Aigis then?
He can
In a GHelot, Thais Team
Aigis & Helot can be substituted by Salvador
Ngl I don't believe in Winkle as a battery. Her own aliemus gen is kinda doodoo
Any ideas what to prio
It really depends on the Player, I often play Carochette so I prioritized Chaos > Caro then move on from there
Do i not use to maximize the middle one
You can, but I personally like the stat bonus more
you need to take all of them to unlock the middle one
I meant the middle one before the realm stats
It goes in order
You don't choose which Resonance to raise
Can i clear madness with supp whale pollux with the bonus ultra stats?
Probably not
You'd need to max out the tree
I wouldn't recommend trying madness before unlocking blessed relics
Hard though, is very possible
alr thanks <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>
madness is a very big difficulty spike
Yh np man
Btw, any dps other than mouch that would fit this criteria?
Kath, Pollux, GHelot, Liz, Sorel, Jenkin
Off the top of my head
Now that I think of it I think I saw a pollux or Castor team with Winkle, but idk if that's just cause they were using everyone else on other teams or if she's actually good with them
Pollux likes casting his OE, Winkle helps with that
Hum, Iirc most of those have other supps they prefer. She's more of a "fill-in in case the other supps are on other teams" kind of character then?
Yeah, pretty much
She's a Generic Aliemus Support
Need Aliemus to cast your Exalt, but don't have anybody else go bring Winkle
Imo Winkle is below par as a aliemus battery. She only has it on exalt and her self gen is middling. OE may be different idk
Who are comparing her to?
Embryos
Ofc
Embryos are the best
Yeah true
No competition
Even without much Embryo Fusion, you can still guarantee an Embryo once every other Turn
But I tell you, is there anyone worse? Even e0 Gdoll has better self gen
And that's a +30 Aliemus (to an Awakener of your Choice,) as well as grants 10% Crit Rate (to your entire Team)
